name: PT Bank Panin Dubai Syariah Tbk
summary: PT Bank Panin Dubai Syariah Tbk operates as a sharia commercial bank for retail, commercial, and corporate customers in Indonesia. It accepts demand, time, current, savings, and other forms of deposits, as well as certificates of deposit. The company also offers PaS iB profit sharing, working capital, house ownership, investment, multi-service, car ownership, sharia revolving, and other financing products. In addition, it purchases securities based on sharia principles, such as retail Sukuk, government sharia bonds, and corporate Sukuk; and issues reference letters. Further, it provides debit cards, online and mobile banking, billing payment, insurance, safe deposit box, real time gross settlement, bank guarantee, PDSB standing order, and clearing services, as well as cash management systems. It operates through a network of 17 branch offices, and 22 ATMs. The company was formerly known as PT Bank Panin Syariah Tbk and changed its name to PT Bank Panin Dubai Syariah Tbk in July 2016. PT Bank Panin Dubai Syariah Tbk was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Bank Panin Dubai Syariah Tbk is a subsidiary of P.T. Bank Pan Indonesia Tbk.
